title: Extract Extension — screenshot last assistant message to clipboard
context: Pi extension that extracts the last assistant message from the session, renders it as a styled PNG image (terminal aesthetic, monospace, dark theme, SebbaFlow™ watermark), and copies to clipboard. Triggered via /extract command and ctrl+shift+e shortcut. Uses Playwright for headless browser screenshotting. Auto-installs Chromium on first run.
architecture: Pipeline: sessionManager.getBranch() → find last AssistantMessage → extract TextContent → markdown → HTML (with terminal CSS + highlight.js syntax highlighting) → Playwright screenshot → PNG buffer → wl-copy. Extension structure follows existing patterns: extract-share/index.ts, package.json, tsconfig.json. Dependencies: playwright (npm), marked (npm), highlight.js (npm).

red.description: Write test that getLastAssistantMessage() extracts text content from session entries with a mock sessionManager returning entries with assistant messages

green.description: Create extract-share/ directory with index.ts, package.json, tsconfig.json. Implement getLastAssistantMessage() that walks getBranch() to find the last assistant role entry and extracts TextContent blocks

red.description: Write test that markdownToHtml() converts a markdown string (with code blocks, bold, lists, headers) to an HTML string with inline CSS styling and highlight.js syntax highlighting classes

green.description: Implement markdownToHtml() using marked with highlight.js for code block syntax highlighting. Add terminal-themed CSS with SebbaFlow™ watermark

red.description: Write test that htmlToPng() takes an HTML string and returns a PNG Buffer, confirming Playwright browser launches and screenshots the rendered page

green.description: Implement htmlToPng() using Playwright. Auto-install Chromium on first run if missing. Set viewport width (~800px), auto-height, dark background

red.description: Write test that copyToClipboard() spawns wl-copy with the PNG buffer as stdin

green.description: Implement copyToClipboard() using spawnSync to pipe PNG buffer to wl-copy

steps.name: Wire up /extract command and ctrl+shift+e shortcut

red.description: Write test that the extension registers a command extract and a shortcut ctrl+shift+e, and that invoking the handler calls getLastAssistantMessage → markdownToHtml → htmlToPng → copyToClipboard with correct arguments

green.description: Wire up the full pipeline in the command and shortcut handlers. Add error handling (no last message, Playwright not installed, clipboard failure). Show ctx.ui.notify on success/failure

red.description: Write integration.test.ts that imports the extension module, confirms it registers without errors against the shared test mocks, and the command/shortcut handlers are wired

green.description: Implement any fixes needed for the integration test to pass

notes: Playwright auto-install: chromium must be installed on first run via npx playwright install chromium
Terminal aesthetic: dark background (#1e1e2e or similar), monospace font (JetBrains Mono or system fallback)
SebbaFlow™ watermark: subtle branding in bottom-right corner
Width ~800px, auto-height based on content length
Syntax highlighting: highlight.js for code blocks

design.currentState: No extract extension exists. Existing pi extensions follow a pattern: directory under pi/.pi/agent/extensions/ with index.ts, package.json, tsconfig.json. Tests use bun:test with shared mocks from @pi-ext/shared/test-mocks. The workspace package.json lists all extensions as workspaces.
design.desiredState: New extract-share extension that: (1) registers /extract command and ctrl+shift+e shortcut, (2) extracts the last assistant message text from the session via sessionManager.getBranch(), (3) converts markdown to styled HTML with terminal aesthetic (dark bg, monospace, SebbaFlow™ watermark), (4) screenshots via Playwright headless Chromium at ~800px width, (5) copies PNG to clipboard using wl-copy/xclip/pbcopy. Auto-installs Chromium on first run.
design.patterns: Extensions register commands via pi.registerCommand('name', { handler, description }). Shortcuts via pi.registerShortcut('ctrl+shift+e', { handler, description }). Session data accessed via ctx.sessionManager.getBranch() returning SessionEntry[] from leaf to root. Assistant messages have role: 'assistant' with content: TextContent[]. Tests use mock.module() from bun:test with factories from @pi-ext/shared/test-mocks.
design.decisions: Playwright for rendering (not silicon). Terminal aesthetic with monospace font, dark background. SebbaFlow™ watermark in bottom-right. Auto-install Chromium on first use. Clipboard only (no file save). ~800px fixed width, auto height. Markdown parser: marked. Syntax highlighting: highlight.js in code blocks. Clipboard: wl-copy only (Wayland).
